definitions: To extend an arm or other part of the body in a particular direction.
To arrive at a particular place or point.
To achieve a particular goal or standard.
To make contact with someone, especially by phone or email.
To be able to touch or grasp something.
examples: She reached for the book on the top shelf.
They finally reached their destination after a long journey.
He reached a new personal best in the race.
I tried to reach him all day, but he didn't answer.
Can you reach the remote control from there?
